content: Turborepo monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Apps: storefront=Next.js 16 App Router (localhost:3000), admin=Next.js 16 App Router (localhost:3001), api=Express 5 (localhost:5000). DB: Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL 16. State: TanStack Query (server), Zustand (client). UI: Tailwind CSS 4 + lucide-react + framer-motion. Shared types/schemas in packages/shared (Zod 4).

All API responses: {success: bool, data?: T, error?: {code, message, details[]}}. JWT: 15min access token + 7day refresh token stored in localStorage (storefront: accessToken/refreshToken, admin: adminAccessToken/adminRefreshToken). Pagination: {items, total, page, limit, totalPages}. Error format: {status, code, message, details}. Zod validation middleware on all routes. Thin controllers, services own all DB access.

Next.js 16 App Router. Server Components by default, use client only when needed. TanStack Query for all data fetching. Zustand stores in src/stores/. Images via next/image + Cloudinary. Framer-motion for animations. API client at src/lib/api-client.ts exports singleton api. Token refresh race condition handled via shared refreshPromise. AbortSignal passed through get() calls.

Next.js 16 App Router. Rich text: Tiptap. Drag-drop: @hello-pangea/dnd. File upload: react-dropzone. Charts: recharts with ResponsiveContainer. Tables: native HTML table (not a library). Sidebar nav in src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx. Admin API client uses adminAccessToken/adminRefreshToken. Orders have optimistic status updates with rollback via TanStack Query onMutate/onError/onSettled.

Express 5 REST API. Controllers in src/controllers/ (thin, delegate to services). Services in src/services/ (own all Prisma DB access). Middleware: auth (JWT verify), validate (Zod schemas), upload (Cloudinary multer). Webhooks: Razorpay signature verification required. Centralized error handler returns {success:false, error:{code,message,details}}. No direct res.json in controllers for errors.

Root CLAUDE.md: monorepo conventions + agent routing. apps/storefront/CLAUDE.md: Next.js patterns. apps/admin/CLAUDE.md: admin patterns. apps/api/CLAUDE.md: Express patterns. packages/shared/src/schemas/: Zod schemas shared across apps. .env files: never commit. ruflo.config.json: swarm config. docs/RUFLO-GUIDE.md: full Ruflo command reference. docs/plans/: feature plans and design docs.

Color palette: forest-green (primary), deep-earth (sidebar bg), earth tones. Font: var(--font-sans). Mobile-first. Tap targets min 44px on mobile. Skeleton loading states match real layout shape. No generic gray boxes as skeletons. Product grids: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Images: always next/image with Cloudinary URLs. No inline styles unless Tailwind cannot do it.

Date: 2026-03-11. Commit: fix: allow Shopify CDN images in Next.js remote patterns

Product images in the database use cdn.shopify.com URLs but only
imagedelivery.net was whitelisted, causing all images to be blocked.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>. Files changed: apps/storefront/next.config.ts

Date: 2026-03-11. Commit: feat: full-bleed 3-column product grid, remove sidebar and filters

Strip products page down to edge-to-edge grid layout with no sidebar,
breadcrumbs, sort, or filter controls. 3 columns on desktop, 2 on mobile.

sections — now only appears in "Composition & Care".

server-side multer limit to allow larger image uploads.

- Increase upload circuit breaker timeout to 120s for large files

Date: 2026-03-16. Commit: perf: enable Next.js Image Optimization on product detail page

- Remove `unoptimized` from all product images — Next.js now serves

- Drop quality from 100 to 75 (visually identical, much smaller files)
- Add responsive `sizes` prop so browsers pick correct srcset variant
